package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringBuilderWriteStringVsPlus() string {
    ruleID := "string_builder_write_string_vs_plus"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`builder.WriteString(a + b)` where `a` and `b` are separate bindings"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
